bω,baBiases of temporal sliding window in [tκ-1,tκ)
tL,tI,tCTimeoffsets of LiDAR, IMU and camera, respectively
tTimestamp of trajectory or sensor measurements
τ = t + toffsetCorrected timestamp of sensor measurements
